description_long: This house is a modern, rectangular residential building set within a walled property featuring a large green lawn, a driveway, and a small pond. The structure is primarily composed of light tan and white materials, with flat roofs and a mix of single and double-story sections. The property includes a driveway leading to a garage, several trees, and a fenced perimeter for privacy. Windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some large panes and others smaller, providing varied natural light. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing clean lines and functionality. The overall design is contemporary, with a focus on open outdoor space and geometric forms.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with tan and white exterior, set in a walled yard with a driveway, pond, and scattered trees. The building features asymmetrical windows and a minimalist entryway.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from the driveway side, highlighting the garage, main entry, and a cluster of trees near the entrance.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the rear and side of the house, revealing the backyard, pond, and a swing set, with more of the lawn visible.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the house from the backyard, focusing on the pond, open lawn, and the rear facade with its window arrangement.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a perspective from the opposite side of the driveway, showing the garage, side yard, and the geometric layout of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with minimal overhang, no porch, and clean geometric lines
